holdings.n: State Street U.S. Government Money Market Portfolio

holdings.infoBox: DHLX is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 6.91%, American International Group at 6.85%, Colgate-Palmolive Company at 6.30%, Aon plc at 5.99%, and Abbott Laboratories at 5.95%.

overview.description: The Diamond Hill Large Cap Concentrated ETF (DHLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio of large-cap US companies. The fund employs a bottom-up investment process that evaluates company fundamentals in assessing value. DHLX was launched on Feb 26, 2021 and is issued by Diamond Hill.
